title: AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF THE BAGO BANTAY ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN QUEZON CITY TO ESTEBAN ABADA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1020 / 55 OG No. 26, 4802 (June 29, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2198, May 07, 1959 ]

AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF THE BAGO BANTAY ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN QUEZON CITY TO ESTEBAN ABADA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Bago Bantay Elementary School in Quezon City is hereby changed to Esteban Abada Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, May 7, 1959.
